meaning: Food and Drug Administration(美国)食品及药物管理局
examples: For years we have argued that the FDA is underfunded.
The FDA has approved a new treatment for a rare blood disorder.
The company has applied to the FDA for a licence to sell the drug.
Negative briefing documents from FDA staff hardly represent a death knell for a drug.
Three recent developments at the FDA will further increase the time and cost of drug development.
